The '''Traffic Interdiction Vessel (TIV)''' was a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] designed and used by the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] for detaining and boarding ships that were suspected of being [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] craft. They were armed with [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]] and [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedoes]].

[[Advanced Recon Commando/Legends|Advanced Recon Commandos]] and [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commandos]] were known to have used TIVs, for example, [[Omega Squad]] used [[TIV Z590/1|one]] during a TIOPS mission; [[Delta Squad/Legends|Delta Squad]] also used a TIV in their hunt for [[Ko Sai/Legends|Ko Sai]].

==Known ships==
*[[TIV Z590/1]]
*[[TIV Z766/2]]
